content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-15) but demo credentials are placeholders ("test"/"changeme") and notes.txt just says "TBD" (fastlane/metadata/review_information/{demo_user,demo_password,notes}.txt).
Pierre: Apple's reviewer cannot get past the Sign In screen with placeholder credentials, which typically results in a rejection for "unable to sign in" or metadata rejection under 2.1. Provide a real working demo account and replace the notes with concrete steps to reach the app's core features (and any paywall/subscription bypass instructions if applicable). Update all three files before submission.
